Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Depending on what game you play at Game Parade, you can increase {f 4 30 0 1 1 0}, {f 4 30 1 1 1 0}, {f 4 30 2 1 1 0}, or a stat of your equipped Persona.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}The arcade cycles through which games are available each day of the week. Time will pass regardless of what game you play.[n]{f 1 1}
